response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and spoken voice correspond excellently with the provided reference steps and details. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was utilized for the musical intro segment, and the remaining merchandise presentation section was transcribed and translated manually based on Mori Calliope's spoken commentary. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps have been meticulously structured to align with spoken cues, avoiding cascading delays during the transition between the rapid song lyrics, concert outro, and the subsequent merchandise sales presentation.

subtitles.original: 舐めんじゃねーよ
subtitles.english: Don't underestimate us!

subtitles.original: 本能をヒリつかせて
subtitles.english: Let your instincts burn,

subtitles.original: 本物見せつけろ
subtitles.english: Show them the real thing!

subtitles.original: 圧倒絶頂
subtitles.english: Overwhelming climax!

subtitles.original: アンバランスを
subtitles.english: Dance in the unbalance...

subtitles.original: 踊れ
subtitles.english: Dance!

subtitles.original: 踊れ
subtitles.english: Dance!

subtitles.original: Thanks for watching, everybody!
subtitles.english: Thanks for watching, everybody!

subtitles.original: Thank you to my guest! Thank you to the band!
subtitles.english: Thank you to my guest! Thank you to the band!

subtitles.original: Thank you to everyone who came to hang out at Members'...
subtitles.english: Thank you to everyone who came to hang out at Members'...

subtitles.original: この後もよろしく！
subtitles.english: Enjoy the rest too!

subtitles.original: Yeah, and point is good.
subtitles.english: Yeah, and point is good.

subtitles.original: That's about all, you guys. I'm Mori Calliope.
subtitles.english: That's about all, you guys. I'm Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: Peace out, see ya!
subtitles.english: Peace out, see ya!

subtitles.original: Woo! Let's go! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Woo! Let's go! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Bye!
subtitles.english: Bye!

subtitles.original: Hey, what's up, you crazy skeleton...
subtitles.english: Hey, what's up, you crazy skeleton...

subtitles.original: I mean...
subtitles.english: I mean...

subtitles.original: Dearest Dead Beats, the hour is finally upon us.
subtitles.english: Dearest Dead Beats, the hour is finally upon us.

subtitles.original: The sale of Mori Calliope's birthday celebration goods is about to begin.
subtitles.english: The sale of Mori Calliope's birthday celebration goods is about to begin.

subtitles.original: On this most auspicious day, you've been granted a great blessing by Death herself.
subtitles.english: On this most auspicious day, you've been granted a great blessing by Death herself.

subtitles.original: A most fortunate occurrence for thee that such a glorious chest should appear before thine eyes.
subtitles.english: A most fortunate occurrence for thee that such a glorious chest should appear before thine eyes.

subtitles.original: Let's take a peek at what the Goddess of Death herself has to offer, shall we?
subtitles.english: Let's take a peek at what the Goddess of Death herself has to offer, shall we?

subtitles.original: The journey ahead is long and arduous. It would do thee good to prepare for it with such luxurious treasures.
subtitles.english: The journey ahead is long and arduous. It would do thee good to prepare for it with such luxurious treasures.

subtitles.original: Firstly, wouldst thou find comfort in dear Death's embrace?
subtitles.english: Firstly, wouldst thou find comfort in dear Death's embrace?

subtitles.original: If it be so, take some warmth along thy journey
subtitles.english: If it be so, take some warmth along thy journey

subtitles.original: with this very large, rollable blanket featuring a most intimidating and battle-ready maiden—
subtitles.english: with this very large, rollable blanket featuring a most intimidating and battle-ready maiden—

subtitles.original: yours truly, designed by my favorite dark fantasy artist, Shimhaq!
subtitles.english: yours truly, designed by my favorite dark fantasy artist, Shimhaq!

subtitles.original: The maiden in question possesses artworks and masks from this particular individual, so
subtitles.english: The maiden in question possesses artworks and masks from this particular individual, so

subtitles.original: I'd be most elated if you bought it for yourself.
subtitles.english: I'd be most elated if you bought it for yourself.

subtitles.original: Lay it across your bed, hang it on your wall, take it with you on an outing—think of the possibilities!
subtitles.english: Lay it across your bed, hang it on your wall, take it with you on an outing—think of the possibilities!

subtitles.original: Secondly, whilst on thy noble journey, thou mayst come to need a spark of aid.
subtitles.english: Secondly, whilst on thy noble journey, thou mayst come to need a spark of aid.

subtitles.original: If it be so, take one of these amulets: the emblem of a knight to boost your strength,
subtitles.english: If it be so, take one of these amulets: the emblem of a knight to boost your strength,

subtitles.original: the emblem of a samurai to grant you additional dexterity,
subtitles.english: the emblem of a samurai to grant you additional dexterity,

subtitles.original: the emblem of a priestess to bestow additional health to thy weary body,
subtitles.english: the emblem of a priestess to bestow additional health to thy weary body,

subtitles.original: and lastly, the emblem of a necromancer to grant thee additional intelligence.
subtitles.english: and lastly, the emblem of a necromancer to grant thee additional intelligence.

subtitles.original: Alas, as fortune be a fickle mistress, thou mayst only receive one in a set.
subtitles.english: Alas, as fortune be a fickle mistress, thou mayst only receive one in a set.

subtitles.original: I pray thee be granted the boon most favorable to thy quest.
subtitles.english: I pray thee be granted the boon most favorable to thy quest.

subtitles.original: Or... or you could just purchase them all separately if you're looking to speedrun the experience, I suppose.
subtitles.english: Or... or you could just purchase them all separately if you're looking to speedrun the experience, I suppose.

subtitles.original: Thirdly, I present to thee the shining centerpiece of this valuable collection.
subtitles.english: Thirdly, I present to thee the shining centerpiece of this valuable collection.

subtitles.original: Take a moment of repose and sit beside this warm and healing light, granted unto thee by Death herself.
subtitles.english: Take a moment of repose and sit beside this warm and healing light, granted unto thee by Death herself.

subtitles.original: A lantern to revive thee as many times as needed throughout even the most daunting of journeys.
subtitles.english: A lantern to revive thee as many times as needed throughout even the most daunting of journeys.

subtitles.original: May it light thy way to victory... or to sweet dreams, whichever is preferred.
subtitles.english: May it light thy way to victory... or to sweet dreams, whichever is preferred.

subtitles.original: Enjoy an elegant design chosen specifically by myself.
subtitles.english: Enjoy an elegant design chosen specifically by myself.

subtitles.original: And of course, how could one continue a journey into vast and unforgiving lands without a source of healing?
subtitles.english: And of course, how could one continue a journey into vast and unforgiving lands without a source of healing?

subtitles.original: Rejuvenate thyself with this generous flask, or rather, glass, that seems to refill endlessly upon rest at your lantern.
subtitles.english: Rejuvenate thyself with this generous flask, or rather, glass, that seems to refill endlessly upon rest at your lantern.

subtitles.original: At least, I think it will. There really are no guarantees in this life, but give it a try yourself, see if the myths are true.
subtitles.english: At least, I think it will. There really are no guarantees in this life, but give it a try yourself, see if the myths are true.

subtitles.original: Enjoy your favorite beverage during a night of exploring your favorite fantasy scenarios.
subtitles.english: Enjoy your favorite beverage during a night of exploring your favorite fantasy scenarios.

subtitles.original: But naturally, it would do me no good to leave thee without a... I don't know, bedtime story? To put this enchanting collection into context.
subtitles.english: But naturally, it would do me no good to leave thee without a... I don't know, bedtime story? To put this enchanting collection into context.

subtitles.original: So, please enjoy a short, audiobook-style recording of a fantastical story written by yours truly.
subtitles.english: So, please enjoy a short, audiobook-style recording of a fantastical story written by yours truly.

subtitles.original: Believe it or not, we are the stars of this tale, so enjoy it on a rainy evening wrapped warmly in Death's embrace.
subtitles.english: Believe it or not, we are the stars of this tale, so enjoy it on a rainy evening wrapped warmly in Death's embrace.

subtitles.original: The... the blanket, I mean. You can use the flask also for like, drinking at the same time, I don't know, just, you should really buy the full set!
subtitles.english: The... the blanket, I mean. You can use the flask also for like, drinking at the same time, I don't know, just, you should really buy the full set!

subtitles.original: And definitely do, because lucky skeletons who act fast and purchase the entire set will be granted a hand-signed postcard
subtitles.english: And definitely do, because lucky skeletons who act fast and purchase the entire set will be granted a hand-signed postcard

subtitles.original: with a special color variant of Shimhaq's masterpiece rendition of Death herself.
subtitles.english: with a special color variant of Shimhaq's masterpiece rendition of Death herself.

subtitles.original: The hand-signed option is in limited supply, so you must be swift.
subtitles.english: The hand-signed option is in limited supply, so you must be swift.

subtitles.original: For those that are unable to secure this extremely rare offering in time, do not fret.
subtitles.english: For those that are unable to secure this extremely rare offering in time, do not fret.

subtitles.original: By purchasing the entire set, a duplicated foil-stamped signature postcard will be sent as a bonus for your purchase.
subtitles.english: By purchasing the entire set, a duplicated foil-stamped signature postcard will be sent as a bonus for your purchase.

subtitles.original: That is all from me, Death's Maiden and dark fantasy enjoyer, Mori Calliope.
subtitles.english: That is all from me, Death's Maiden and dark fantasy enjoyer, Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: This year's goods are very different from my usual, but I wanted to pay tribute to a genre that I love so dearly and has really made every day of my job so wonderful and happy.
subtitles.english: This year's goods are very different from my usual, but I wanted to pay tribute to a genre that I love so dearly and has really made every day of my job so wonderful and happy.

subtitles.original: I am so grateful to you guys for coming to enjoy my show as well.
subtitles.english: I am so grateful to you guys for coming to enjoy my show as well.

subtitles.original: Comment and let me know what your favorite part was, be sure to like the concert so others may be recommended it, and subscribe if you enjoy Mori Calliope!
subtitles.english: Comment and let me know what your favorite part was, be sure to like the concert so others may be recommended it, and subscribe if you enjoy Mori Calliope!

subtitles.original: With that, I bid thee farewell. And happy birthday to me!
subtitles.english: With that, I bid thee farewell. And happy birthday to me!
